title: [MTR] 0 Series Shinkansen
description: 0 Series Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the 0 Series Shinkansen to the game. It includes multiple variants (old versions with long windows, different pantograph variants, Kodama livery, etc).

All variants include cabs, standard cars, green cars and pantograph cars as well as diner cars for some.

[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)

Please enjoy it!

![0 Series Shinkansen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44426bfa7ddf0323a72683e95c90ab0e59adbe2c.jpeg)
